assessor_1_raw: Retail escalation prediction: well-designed with temporal split, PR-AUC, and fair TF-IDF+LR baseline. Agent behavior confound controls are comprehensive. Queue policy monitoring is a good deployment concern check. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_2_raw: Sound experiment design. Both models receive identical text input. Equal tuning effort with same selection criterion. Bootstrap CIs with 1,000 resamples are appropriate. Per-agent and per-channel stratification enable confound detection. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_3_raw: The design correctly uses PR-AUC for imbalanced prediction. The agent ID ablation tests whether agent behavior confounds results. Label prevalence monitoring across splits detects policy changes. No methodological flaws. Verdict: defense_wins.
